'''鈭歾h-r-sh-p''' ('''kazharshepoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:flabergast|flabergast]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-r-sh-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:flabergast|flabergast]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾h-r-sh-p
|-
! Lemma
| kazharshepoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizharshepoko|thizharshepoko]] || [[word:jizharshepoko|jizharshepoko]] || [[word:shizharshepoko|shizharshepoko]] || [[word:kizharshepoko|kizharshepoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozharshepoko|thozharshepoko]] || [[word:jozharshepoko|jozharshepoko]] || [[word:shozharshepoko|shozharshepoko]] || [[word:kozharshepoko|kozharshepoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
